feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Space Between Heartbeats
entry.summary:
Author: BuddiebuckDiaz

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,425Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 1

Summary: “You came for me.” “Always.” In the aftermath of Bobby’s death, the 118 faces another impossible night when Athena is shot and an active shooter locks down the hospital. Trapped in a stalled elevator with a bleeding Eddie Diaz, Buck is forced to confront the terrifying possibility of losing the person he loves most.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Fate
entry.summary:
Author: slippymelon

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,413Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Evan "Buck" Buckley doesn't believe in soulmates. Buck thinks fate is some stupid thing someone from thousands of years ago. But everyone tells him its real. Everyone says he'll find his one true love by fate. But Buck is skeptical, because why should he rely on hope that someone will magically be his forever? ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ Eddie Diaz desperately wants to feel love, even after Shannon left. He wants to be able to have a partner beside him again. He fully believes in the soulmates and thinks his is still out there, in the world, waiting for him. He hasn't given up hope, because why should he? He knows the one for him is still out there, waiting...

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: You slipped through the Cracks in your Training
entry.summary:
Author: openreal

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,841Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: EDDIE"I should have stopped at the glass doors. I don’t know why I didn’t." BUCK"Because Eddie, you were doing your job. You saved all those people, and you are allowed to want them to have a good ending. We will figure it out, we always do." or. Speculation for Hearts and Flowers, and how Eddie gets shot. Eddie blames himself for Athena getting shot and is adamant that Hooks had more to do with it then people are leading on. Obviously, Buck is there too.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Make Me
entry.summary:
Author: Buckedie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 766Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Buck teases and challenges Eddie in the station break room, leading to Eddie loosing it and rushing them both to the bunks and taking him right there — hot, intense and risky. Afterward, Eddie checks he’s okay and soothes him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: It Wasn’t Just a Hookup
entry.summary:
Author: AstraeaXAccalia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,961Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 50

Summary: There’s weight across him, an arm draped loosely but firmly over his torso, the faint, steady rhythm of someone else’s breathing brushing against his skin. Skin against skin. No barrier, no layers, nothing between them except heat and contact.  Why is Eddie... Oh my god. Or Buck wakes up hungover in a hotel room after Chim’s bachelor party, realizes he and Eddie had a very real hookup… and immediately spirals into panic because now he’s convinced Eddie was just drunk and he’s single-handedly ruined their entire relationship.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Missing Branch
entry.summary:
Author: izquierd

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,651Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 97

Summary: “It’s so cool that your dads are both firefighters! They’ve probably seen a lot of emergencies.” Chris goes through his memory of the stories told at dinner time: plane crash, earthquake, bombing, tsunami, mudslide, shooting—wow it really is a long list. “Yeah, they’ve seen lots of—wait, dads?” Chris’ brain suddenly halts, processing Jeremy’s full statement. “Yeah! Or your dad and stepdad, sorry!” “Buck’s not my dad—or stepdad.” Jeremy slumps back into his cafeteria seat, brows furrowed. “Oh? I just—you guys seemed very…close.”Christopher gets confused about Buck's place in their family, and starts to ask questions—questions that Buck and Eddie don't have answers to.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I’ll Keep You Safe
entry.summary:
Author: mynameismery

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,084Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: Eddie managed to open his eyes again. His face was clammy and pale. His eyes, once so bright and full of life, were now unfocused and tired. He weakly reached up to Buck, his hand was about to fall when Buck took it. “I’m here, I’m here,” Buck wasn’t trying to stop the tears streaming down his face anymore. He could feel Eddie’s breath getting slower under his hand, he could feel the hot blood seeping through his fingers no matter how hard he tried to stop it. Eddie was fading right in front of him and there was nothing he could do.   Or Buck and Eddie are stuck in the elevator after Eddie gets shot. Buck is trying to keep him alive.

entry.title: God Loves You (But Not Enough To Save You)
entry.summary:
Author: ad_lunam

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,307Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Because it has always been him. The origin point of consequence, the body through which punishment distributes itself outward. And all his life, he had run from it, letting others take the hit, turning them into sacrifices when it should have been him from the start. His chest aches as another broken sob escapes him. And slowly, through the ache and the shaking, something shifts inside him until even prayer changes shape, until it is no longer plea but transaction, no longer asking but offering. Retribution. ———— Or, a character study on Eddie Diaz’s religious guilt.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: watching you is the only thing that I know
entry.summary:
Author: bvckley

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,259Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 123

Summary: “And the way Diaz looks at him?” Sam goes on, and Buck starts to wonder if he made a list beforehand to have all the complaints ready. “Like fully-ass staring, doesn’t even blink. I was so sure he’s about to kiss him mid sentence.” Buck drops a box, cuts the answer off. The dull, plastic clatter echoes through the empty kitchen like a gong. or, Sam isn’t really happy to work with Eddie. Buck has some realizations about it.

entry.title: Seventy Miles Too Late
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,173Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Buck returns alone to a lake that once defined his relationship with Eddie, reflecting on how their love slowly unraveled through distance, silence, and things left unsaid. After time apart—Eddie retreating inward and Buck trying to move on—they cross paths again when Eddie reappears in Buck’s life, first in a crowd and then through letters that attempt to rekindle what they lost.When they finally meet at the lake, Eddie admits he’s never met anyone like Buck, but the confession comes too late. Buck, having already given everything, chooses not to go back to something that broke him. The story ends with Buck letting go of the past, accepting that love alone wasn’t enough to save them. -- Inspired by a song by Giant Rooks called Want It Back

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: You know I wanna beat it, Wanna beat it bad
entry.summary:
Author: Cgb2205

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,661Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: He feels like he’s on a roller coaster, impossibly high and caught in a swirl of dread. Eyes shut, heart racing, each breath heavier than the last. Buck clings to the sensation, anticipating the fall before it arrives. He wonders how nobody else notices the suffocating anxiety, the cold in his veins. He thinks about how easily he masks it, how he laughs and jokes, when inside, everything aches. He feels it etched into his bones; they ache, his skeleton cries for help before his mind can anticipate what comes next.   Or, me projecting my own issues onto Buck.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: At the alter, I beg
entry.summary:
Author: Little_Moon_33

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,593Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

Summary: "Why do you keep insisting that your life is worth less than everyone else's?" "Because it is," Buck snapped, but there wasn't any heat behind it. Eddie watched Buck, not bothering to dignify his proclamation with a response. He saw fear and sorrow both warring to be the prominent emotion in his expression. Nearly a decade later and he still didn't know how to stress just how important one Evan Buckley was to the world. Not only the world, but to the Diaz family in particular. He wasn't convinced he was going to make it until reinforcements came. And if things were reversed, he'd kill Buck. -- Or: Buddie stuck in an elevator, inspired by the finale promo

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: "I'll take a chance on leaving, It's that or stay and die"
entry.summary:
Author: Jamez_of_calamity

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,306Chapters: 1/20Kudos: 10

Summary: What if Buck and Eddie had Chris, what if buck ran away stifled by the expectations of motherhood drowning raising a baby alone, what if he then transitioned traveled the world before finding himself at the 118, what if Eddie shows up not recognizing him not knowing he's staring at his son's other fatherWhat if Eddie and Buck had Chris, what if Eddie got a girl he barely knew pregnant, what if they where pressured to keep it, what if he joins the army abandoning her, what if she leaves with just a note and a son for him to raise alone, what if Eddie joins the 118 not knowing he's staring at his son's other father- or a alternate universe where Buck takes Shannons place in the story, angst and chaos ensue

entry.title: sticky, sticky, stuck
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,398Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1,149

Summary: “Eddie! Eddie, hey, hi. Sorry. Theo, don’t touch that! Don’t touch that! Ah, frick. He’s - - he’s touching it.” “Is everything okay?” “No. No. I’m - - locked out. Theo is locked in. Well - - he locked himself in. Accidentally. I think. I’m pretty sure. Anyway, I need your key. I need your key really fast. Theo! Buddy. Please. Don’t eat that. That’s not for eating. Theo. Theo. Don’t - -” Buck lets out a loaded, patient breath. “Ideally as fast as you can.”  Or, Theo locks Buck out. Eddie comes to the rescue.

entry.title: My Dreams Are Just Dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Feybird395

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,041Chapters: 3/11Kudos: 56

Summary: Evan Buckley was nine years old the day he disappeared. It takes eleven years of hell to get the courage to escape the organisation that raised him. It'll take years more before he finally feels like a person again, for the ghosts of his past to stop haunting his every move. He becomes Buck, becomes a firefighter, finds a family, a sister, and two best friends. And then when he's thirty-one, Chris is taken. And if he wants to get him back, he'll need to face the past he thought he'd finally escaped. (OR: A Red Room, Assassin AU)

entry.title: because you have to
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,420Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 97

Summary: After years of chaos, Buck has finally built the life he once thought was impossible: a soulmate he gets to call his husband, three kids who are his entire universe, and a new beginning in LA that feels like hope. But just when everything settles, a diagnosis shatters the illusion of safety and forces Buck to confront the fight of his life. The fic where Buck is diagnosed with cancer and has to fight for the future he always wanted — and the family that refuses to let him face it alone.

entry.title: Overdoing it
entry.summary:
Author: Qza29o

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 755Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: Buck and Chris go to the zoo for the first time since he got back from Texas. Buck rents a wheelchair for himself. Sparks some good conversations about their futures. Day 23 of Sicktember: Overdoing it
